verses.text: God says the people are too many; the fearful go home. Too many. Lest they boast.
God says the people are too many; the fearful go home. Too many. Lest they boast.
God says the people are too many; the fearful go home. Too many. Lest they boast.
By the water, three hundred who lapped are kept. The three hundred. God saves by few.
By the water, three hundred who lapped are kept. The three hundred. God saves by few.
By the water, three hundred who lapped are kept. The three hundred. God saves by few.
By the water, three hundred who lapped are kept. The three hundred. God saves by few.
By the water, three hundred who lapped are kept. The three hundred. God saves by few.
God bids Gideon spy the camp for courage. Encouraged. God steadies His servant.
God bids Gideon spy the camp for courage. Encouraged. God steadies His servant.
God bids Gideon spy the camp for courage. Encouraged. God steadies His servant.
He hears a dream of a barley cake overturning the tent. The dream. God gives assurance.
He hears a dream of a barley cake overturning the tent. The dream. God gives assurance.
He hears a dream of a barley cake overturning the tent. The dream. God gives assurance.
Gideon worships and arms the three hundred with trumpets and lamps. Armed. Faith uses strange weapons.
Gideon worships and arms the three hundred with trumpets and lamps. Armed. Faith uses strange weapons.
Gideon worships and arms the three hundred with trumpets and lamps. Armed. Faith uses strange weapons.
Gideon worships and arms the three hundred with trumpets and lamps. Armed. Faith uses strange weapons.
They blow and cry; Midian flees and slays itself. Routed. God turns the foe on itself.
They blow and cry; Midian flees and slays itself. Routed. God turns the foe on itself.
They blow and cry; Midian flees and slays itself. Routed. God turns the foe on itself.
They blow and cry; Midian flees and slays itself. Routed. God turns the foe on itself.
Israel pursues; the princes Oreb and Zeeb are slain. Pursued. The victory is complete.
